questionHtml:
What is PCR used for?

A. Separate fragments of DNA by size

B. Amplify small amounts of DNA

C. Compare DNA samples

D. Genetically modify organisms’ DNA

meta.title: What is PCR used for? A. Separate fragments of DNA by size B. Amplify small amounts of DNA C. Compare DNA samples D. Genetically modify organisms’ DNA
